name: LOL: Last One Laughing Indonesia
overview: The hosts will lead top comedians in a chaotic battle of wits and endurance. A room devoid of laughter, where comedians armed with jokes and timing engage in a high-stakes battle to survive longer.

trailers.title: LOL Indonesia: Yang Ketawa Kalah | Trailer | Pandji Pragiwaksono, Andre Taulany, Ivan Gunawan
Peci merah bahaya banget, serangannya kayak sniper 😭 | LOL Indonesia: Yang Ketawa Kalah
